items.title: Score Sonos’ flagship Ace ANC headphones for $279 while they’re $120 off today
items.summary: We are now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops the black Sonos Ace over-ear ANC headphones down to $279 shipped. These launched at $450, similar to Sony’s popular XM6, though they have recently been sitting closer to $399 at Amazon. We did see them briefly drop to $265 during Prime Day, but that offer was short-lived, which very few were able to grab. Today’s deal brings them back within $14 of that all-time low, making it a great chance to land Sonos’ flagship headphones for much less. The white model is also available, but it is currently fetching the full $399 price. Head below for more details.

items.title: Expand LEGO Mario Kart collections with more antagonists via this Wario & King Boo set down at $33
items.summary:
LEGO Super Mario: Mario Kart – Wario & King Boo set

Buy for $33 (Reg. $40)

What we love

If you or a loved one are collectors of LEGO’s Mario Kart building sets, you’ll have some fun antagonistic expansion bringing home this particular unit. Not only do the karts fire shells for some playful action, but they also have figures for both Wario and King Boo to drive as they drift around your raceways, bringing along some villains for Mario, Luigi, Peach, and others to clash against. The stories and playtime can be endless!

items.title: Upgrade to Keychron’s full-size C2 Pro mechanical keyboard for just $35 today (45% off)
items.summary: As part of a wider sale on Keychron keyboards, Woot is offering the brand’s C2 Pro full-size mechanical keyboard for $34.99 Prime shipped with a $5 discount that auto-applies during checkout. New customers shopping for the first time at Woot can save an additional $5 off, bringing it further down to just $29.99 Prime shipped. Though this keyboard carries a $70 price tag, it typically goes for $64 at Amazon via the brand’s official storefront. It’s currently fetching $54 there, but Woot’s offer takes an additional $19 off to mark the lowest price we have tracked for it to date. It doesn’t get much less than this for a full-size mechanical keyboard with support for QMK/VIA key programming for keys, and you might want to jump in and snag one while the deal is still live.

items.title: Lectric flash sale gives you a FREE $498 cargo bundle with the 85-mile traveling XP4 750 folding utility e-bike at $1,299
items.summary: Now that 4th of July savings are over, Lectric has launched a flash sale on its XP4 750 Long-Range Folding Utility e-bike that is getting a FREE $498 cargo bundle at $1,299 shipped in all its colorways. This is an even larger package than we saw it receive for July 4th, which would cost you $1,797 in full were it not for the brand’s trend of discounting the bundled items on its e-bikes. It’s a great option for folks who are regularly planning to use it for errands, hauling carious cargo, and the like, as the bundle contains a LevelUp rack, steel-encased front and rear cargo baskets, a cargo net, an Elite headlight, a bike lock, and a phone mount. You can also go with the standard XP4 e-bike at $999 shipped, but keep in mind the flash sale doesn’t extend to it, and you’ll only get a $79 FREE bundle. You can learn more about this e-bike below or by reading my in-depth hands-on review – plus, there’s all the other current e-bike deals on the main landing page here.

items.title: Twelve South AirFly Pro: Transmit wireless audio from anything to your AirPods at nearly 30% off
items.summary:
Twelve South AirFly Pro

Buy for $40 (Reg. $55)

What we love

It might not be the latest model, but it can still connect wired-only audio sources to your AirPods and other wireless headphones much the same. This is also the same pro model I always have in my travel kit that delivers 25 hours of battery life and can also work with “gym equipment, gaming devices, TVs, or any 3.5mm audio jack” – it can function in reverse as well, receiving audio wirelessly for “non-Bluetooth devices like wired speakers, soundbars, rental cars, and boat sound systems.”

items.title: Just $10 gets you Anker’s tiny 25W USB-C charger with a cable today
items.summary:
Anker 25W USB-C Wall Charger with Cable

Buy for $10 (Reg. $13)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

At just $10 today, this Anker charger is an easy pickup for adding a reliable USB-C power brick to your nightstand, desk, kitchen counter, or travel bag without spending much. It is compact enough to keep plugged in around the house, and 25W is still plenty for charging phones, earbuds, and other everyday accessories. Anker also includes a color-matched USB-C cable in the box, which makes the whole package an even better value at this price.
